title: Is session token in monday sdk a server-side operation?
excerpt: do monday generate and encode the token in server side ?

posts.author: cokihim (Cohikim)
posts.cookedHtml: do monday generate and encode the token in server side ?

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @cokihim! Can you share a bit more about what you’re trying to achieve with the session token, and why knowing where it’s encoded is useful to you?

I don’t know off the top of my head but I can check in with our engineers once you send those details.

posts.author: cokihim (Cohikim)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @dipro ,

We’d like to know if the token generation process can be manipulated (changing client secrets, etc) in the client side. This is for security purposes.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @cokihim!

No. The token generation process can’t be manipulated in the client side.

Let us know if you have any other questions

Cheers,
-Matias
